name: Other payment receiver
description: Reports information about upfront and termination payments, if applicable to a transaction, and optionally for notional amount exchanges for cross-currency interest rate swaps. The entity identifier is reported as an LEI of any registration status or a Designated Business Identifier or Client Code.
format: LEI (any registration status), Designated Business Identifier, Client Code
optionalityRules: Required for upfront payments if applicable (page 120, Condition table).
Required for termination payments if applicable (page 120, Condition table).
Optional for notional amount exchanges for cross-currency interest rate swaps (page 120, Condition table).
For any Action type for which an Other payment amount is reported, Other payment receiver is required (page 122, paragraph 462(e)(i)).
valueRules: The entity identifier is reported as an LEI of any registration status, or a Designated Business Identifier or Client Code for any other person (page 122, paragraph 461).

If Other payment payer or receiver are the same entities as Counterparty 1 or Counterparty 2, then the entity identifier conditions for Counterparty 1 or Counterparty 2 ordinarily apply (page 122, paragraph 460(a)).
If Other payment payer or receiver is a third party, the 2024 Rules do not condition the entity identifier of such a third party (page 122, paragraph 460(b)).
If reported, the formats of the values conform to the 2024 Rules specifications (page 122, paragraph 462(f)).
Values are not reported for the not-reported Action types (page 122, paragraph 462(g)).
